raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Mohnu-Semmes/ un no Elama/ 
un no Sinearâ/ un no Eemata/ 
un no fahm Inbras Gallahm.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch uſzels weenu 
Karrogu ſtarp teem Paganeem/ 
un tapulzehs tohs Jſwajatus 
Iſraëta/ un tohs Iſkaifitus no 
Juha/ no wiſfahm tfchetrahin 
Semmes Weetahm.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ta Skaudiba Eewra- 
ima mitteſees/ un tee Prettitur- 
retaji Juha taps iſdeldeti/ Ge- 
wraims ne ſkandibs Juhu/ un 
Juha ne ſpaitibs to Eewraimu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet tee ſkraidibs teem 
Wiſiſtereeim pahr Plezzehm prett 
Wakkara-Puffi/ tee aptanpihs 
kobpa tohs Eedsihwotajus prett 
Rihteeim/ prett Eedomu un Mo- 
abu iſſteepe tee fawu Robku/ un 
Ammona Behrni buhs teem 
paklaufigi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ir tas KUNGS iſnih- 
zinahs to Raggu tahu Egiptes 
Juhas/ un kuſtinahs fawu 
Robku prett fo Uppt zaur fawa 
Wehja Stiprumu/ un fittihs 
tahs feptinas Straumes/ ka ar 
Kurpehin warrehs zauri eet.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un weens ſtaigahbs 
Jeſſch buhs preeſſch teem Atlik- 
kufcheem winna Lauschu/ kas 
atliktuſchi buhs no Affura/ itt 
ka Iſraëtam notikke tai Deena/ 
kad tas iſgahje no Egiptes- 
Semmes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "N tai Deena tu faZZi- 
fi: Es pateiznu tem 
KUNGS/ ka tu eſſi 
duſinigs bijs pahr manni/ un 
tawa Duſintba irr nowehrſu- 
fees/ un tu eeprzeezina manni.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Redſi/ tas STIPRajs 
DEEWS irr manna Peſtiſcha- 
na/ es gribbu zerrehrt un ne bih- 
tees/ jo tas Klungs KUNGS 
irr mans Stiprums/ un man- 
na Teibſchanas Dſeefma/ un 
irr man par Peſtiſchannu tap- 
pis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un juhs finelſeet ar Preeki 
Uhdeni no teem Awoteem tahs 
Peſtiſchanas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un faZZifeet tai Deena: 
Pateizeet tam KUNGAM/ pee- 
fauzeet winna Wahrdn/ darrajt 
sinnamus winna Darbus ſtarp 
teem Laudim/ peeminneet tai 
winna Wahrdn irr pa-augſt- 
nahts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Dseedajt tam KUNGAM/ 
jo wiꞥſch irr augſt teizamas 
Ceetas darrijs/ lai tas sinnams 
irr wits wiſſas Semmes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Gawile un teiz tu Gedſih- 
wotaja no Zianas/ jo tas Iſrae- 
ta Swehtajs irr leels tawa 
Widdn.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
